introSection: Cheddar Chase is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Alabama Adventure and Splash Adventure in Bessemer, Alabama, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride debuted at Lake Winnepesaukah in 2001 as Wild Thing. In 2002, it was changed to Wild Lightnin'.

Wild Lightnin' was removed in 2021. The attraction was then sent to Alabama Adventure and Splash Adventure. The ride would now be called Cheddar Chase. It would eventually reopen on May 14, 2022.

fullText:
Cheddar Chase is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Alabama Adventure and Splash Adventure in Bessemer, Alabama, USA.

The ride debuted at Lake Winnepesaukah in 2001 as Wild Thing. In 2002, it was changed to Wild Lightnin'.

Wild Lightnin' was removed in 2021. The attraction was then sent to Alabama Adventure and Splash Adventure. The ride would now be called Cheddar Chase. It would eventually reopen on May 14, 2022.



Orange track and unpainted supports.
